name: project-wedding
description: Project Dynamic Single-Page Untuk Undangan Pernikahan with CMS Angular, Express, Prisma ORM, dan MySQL

scripts.dev:fe: cd client && bun x ng serve
scripts.dev: bun x concurrently "npm run dev:fe" "npm run dev:be"
scripts.db:push: cd server && bun x prisma db push
scripts.db:pull: cd server && bun x prisma db pull
scripts.db:gen: cd server && bun x prisma generate
scripts.db:init: cd server && bun x prisma db pull && bun x prisma generate

author: Iqsan Syachranie
